title: VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION - 211info
text: UMATILLA COUNTY PENDLETON CLINIC VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides childhood immunizations and some adult immunizations. Offers influenza (flu) vaccines as they become available each season, along with vaccine information. 200 SE 3rd Street Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 278-5423 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 278-5423 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurance, sliding scale fees offered to uninsured patients. No child will be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Immunization record and insurance information, if available LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Umatilla County Services: Childhood Immunization Flu Vaccines Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - NURSE FAMILY PARTNERSHIP SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - TOBACCO CESSATION COUNSELING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. UMATILLA COUNTY PENDLETON CLINIC
